name: 成都
description: Chengdu, the capital of Sichuan province, is known as the 'City of Revelry' for its laid-back lifestyle, spicy cuisine, and the giant pandas. Home to ancient Shu culture, it offers relaxing tea houses, spicy hot pot, the historic Jinli Street, and proximity to the scenic Jiuzhaigou and Leshan Giant Buddha.
highlights: Giant Panda Base - Home to adorable pandas
Jinli Street - Ancient Shu culture and snacks
People's Park - Tea houses and pandas

climate.tips: Best visited in spring and autumn. Summers hot and humid but indoor AC everywhere. Winters mild but foggy. Rain common year-round. Bring umbrella.

attractions.name: 成都大熊猫繁育研究基地
attractions.nameEn: Chengdu Research Base of Giant Panda Breeding
attractions.description: The world's largest giant panda breeding center with over 80 pandas in natural habitat settings.
attractions.tips: Arrive at opening to catch pandas most active in morning. Visit in summer for cubs. Allow 3+ hours for full visit. Shuttle bus from Tianfu Square.

attractions.name: 锦里古街
attractions.description: A reconstructed ancient street showcasing Shu culture with traditional architecture, street food, tea houses, and shops.
attractions.tips: Best in evening when lit. Try stinky tofu and sugar paintings. Combine with Wuhou Temple nearby.

attractions.name: 武侯祠
attractions.description: China's most famous memorial temple dedicated to Liu Bei and Zhuge Liang of the Three Kingdoms period.
attractions.tips: Combined ticket with Jinli Street available. Morning visits cooler. Combine with Jinli Street.

attractions.name: 都江堰
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage site - the world's oldest functional irrigation system still in use today, built in 256 BC.
attractions.tips: Combine with nearby Qingcheng Mountain day trip. Take early bus from Chengdu for full day.

attractions.name: 川剧变脸秀
attractions.description: Traditional Sichuan opera featuring the famous face-changing (bianlian) technique where actors change masks in seconds.
attractions.tips: Book through hotel concierge. Tea included in price. Photography restricted during show. Best experience of traditional art.

attractions.name: 青城山
attractions.description: A Taoist mountain with ancient temples, forest trails, and the birthplace of China's Taoist culture. UNESCO World Heritage.
attractions.tips: Combine with Dujiangyan. Take high-speed train from Chengdu. Wear hiking shoes. Take cable car up, walk down.

attractions.name: 人民公园
attractions.description: The heart of Chengdu's tea house culture with traditional teahouses, matchmaking corner, and tai chi areas.
attractions.tips: Try a traditional tea ceremony. The park comes alive on weekends. Best to experience authentic Chengdu lifestyle.

attractions.name: 金沙遗址博物馆
attractions.description: A major archaeological site dating to the Shu Kingdom (1250-650 BC) with a modern museum showcasing gold relics.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than other museums. Audio guide essential for context. Combine with nearby Temple of Marquis.

attractions.name: 乐山大佛
attractions.description: The world's largest stone Buddha statue (71m tall) carved into a cliff at the confluence of three rivers.
attractions.tips: Day trip from Chengdu recommended. Book a tour or take high-speed train. Best viewed from boat for full perspective.

attractions.name: 天府广场
attractions.description: Chengdu's central square and transportation hub with the iconic Sichuan Museum and philosophy statues.
attractions.tips: Good starting point for city exploration. Metro lines 1 and 2 connect here. Sichuan Museum free entry with ID.

attractions.name: 三星堆博物馆
attractions.description: A mysterious ancient civilization site with extraordinary bronze masks and gold artifacts predating the Han dynasty.
attractions.tips: One of China's greatest archaeological discoveries. Audio guide highly recommended. Take bus from Chengdu's east station.

restaurants.name: 松云泽
restaurants.address: 6-7 Jinli West First Rd, Wuhou District
restaurants.description: Two Michelin star Sichuan cuisine restaurant showcasing authentic flavors with modern presentation.

restaurants.name: 廊桥遗风
restaurants.description: One Michelin star restaurant with stunning river views and refined Sichuan cuisine.

restaurants.name: 大妙火锅
restaurants.description: Famous hot pot chain with excellent dipping sauces and quality ingredients.

restaurants.name: 蜀大侠
restaurants.description: Popular hot pot chain known for quality meat and reasonable prices.

restaurants.name: 龙抄手
restaurants.description: Legendary restaurant specializing in wontons (chaoshou) and Sichuan snacks.

restaurants.name: 玉林串串香
restaurants.description: The legendary inventor of chuan chuan (skewer hot pot), still the most famous branch.

restaurants.name: 夫妻肺片
restaurants.description: Legendary restaurant famous for its namesake dish - husband and wife lung slices (cold beef offal in chili oil).
dishHighlights: Fu Qi Fei Pian (cold beef offal)

restaurants.name: 鹤鸣茶社
restaurants.description: Chengdu's most famous traditional tea house in People's Park, operating since 1923.

restaurants.name: 马旺子川小馆
restaurants.description: One diamond Black Pearl restaurant serving refined Sichuan home-style dishes in a beautiful courtyard setting.

restaurants.name: 听香餐馆
restaurants.description: Popular upscale casual spot known for innovative Sichuan dishes without losing traditional soul.

arrival.from: Major international airports, many domestic connections
arrival.tips: New airport (TFU) opened 2021 with metro connection. Also old Shuangliu Airport for some flights.

arrival.to: Chengdu East Railway Station / Chengdu Station
arrival.tips: High-speed rail network well-connected. Book early for popular routes.

metro: Line 1 to Panda Base, line 2 to Jinli
bus: Bamboo bikes (zhongbao) useful for short trips
bike: Good for short trips in center

hotels.name: 成都博舍
hotels.bookingTips: One of Chengdu's best hotels. Book far ahead.

hotels.name: 成都太古里春熙亚朵酒店
highlights: Near Taikoo Li and Chunxi Road
hotels.bookingTips: Best budget option near major shopping.

tips: Chengdu is modern city - most places accept cards
But download Alipay for markets and street food

payment.description: Useful for traditional teahouses and small vendors

culturalTips.title: Chengdu Lifestyle
culturalTips.content: Chengdu people are known for laid-back lifestyle (mafan). Teahouse culture is important - people spend hours drinking tea and playing mahjong. Spicy food and chill vibe define the city.

culturalTips.title: Sichuan Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Sichuan cuisine (川菜) known for numbing spice (ma la). Key dishes: hot pot, mapo tofu, dan dan noodles. Tea with food is common for digestion of spice.

culturalTips.title: Panda Conservation
culturalTips.content: Giant pandas are endangered species and national treasure. Chengdu's Panda Base is leading conservation efforts. Respect the animals' welfare guidelines.

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Chengdu is famous for its tea houses. Try a traditional bamboo-chair tea session in People Park. The city consumes more tea than any other city in China. Sichuan opera shows are also a must-see evening entertainment.

emergencyContacts.name: 成都新世纪妇女儿童医院
emergencyContacts.nameEn: Chengdu New Century Women & Children's Hospital

emergencyContacts.name: 四川大学华西医院
emergencyContacts.notes: Best public hospital in western China, excellent for complex cases

emergencyContacts.name: 美国驻成都总领事馆
emergencyContacts.address: IFS Tower 2, 1 Middle Section of Hong Kong Rd, Jinjiang

quickFacts.visa: Most nationalities require visa. 144h transit visa available at airport for eligible nationalities.
quickFacts.water: Tap water safe but use bottled water
